身障票券入場辦法 Accessible Ticket Policy
持有身障手冊的本人購票`本人入場;進場時須檢查身障手冊為本人{也請陪同者攜帶身份證件
以供查驗)若非本人無法入場`無法退票%陪同者若無陪同身障朋友無法單獨入席%
Accessible tickets must be purchased and used by the registered holder ofa disability identification
card. The disabilityID will be checked upon entry and must match the ticket holder. Companions are
also required to presentavalidID forverification. Ifthe ticket holderis notthe registered person, entry
will be denied and no refunds will be issued. Companions may not enter or be seated without the
eligible ticketholder.

1
拉瞄壓掃

2
用無線電或手機或LINE通報給小組長/幹部
並立即請該區域民眾
遠離火源
等待滅火班成員處理

立即移除阻擋安全梯之雜物

5.
火災時不可以搭乘電梯及手扶梯
